_comment: Local override for external-plugins.json. Copy this file to 'external-plugins.local.json' and edit. The local file takes precedence over the repo-shipped external-plugins.json when present, letting you add private plugin repos without committing private URLs to the public repo. This file is gitignored once renamed to external-plugins.local.json.
_note: After adding a plugin entry, also add the plugin's directory to your local .git/info/exclude (NOT .gitignore) so fetched files don't show up as untracked: `src/plugins/<name>/`
